topPlaces.name: Kolenchery
topPlaces.description: Kolenchery is a town in the Poothrikka gram panchayat in Ernakulam district, Kerala. Located on National Highway 85, Kolenchery is situated 3 km (1.9 mi) from Poothrikka and 20 km (12 mi) from Kochi.

topPlaces.name: Aikaranad South
topPlaces.description: Aikaranad South is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Aikaranad South is also known as Poothrikka.

topPlaces.name: Kottoor
topPlaces.description: Kottoor Church or Kottoor St. George Orthodox Syrian Church is a chapel of Kolenchery Church.

topPlaces.name: Aikkaranad
topPlaces.description: Aikaranad Grama panchayat is a Grama panchayat in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Aikaranad Grama panchayat is situated in Vadavukode Block panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Kadayiruppu
topPlaces.description: Kadayiruppu is a village on the outskirts of Kolenchery town in Kerala, India. Kadayiruppu located 4 km from Kolenchery on Perumbavoor Road.

topPlaces.name: Pancode
topPlaces.description: Pancode is a small village in Ernakulam district of the state of Kerala in India. Pancode is just 16 km away from the prestigious Smart City Project and InfoPark, Kochi.

topPlaces.name: Mazhuvannoor
topPlaces.description: Mazhuvannoor is a panchayat village in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. It is located in the Kunnathunad taluk.

topPlaces.name: Vadavucode
topPlaces.description: Vadavucode is a village in the Ernakulam district in the state of Kerala, India near the town of Puthencruz. It is one of the local and Developing Village Near Puthencruz Town.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Peter and St. Paul's Church, Kolenchery?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Peter and St. Paul's Church, Kolenchery is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Peter and St. Paul's Church, Kolenchery?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (21 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (21 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Peter and St. Paul's Church, Kolenchery?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Peter and St. Paul's Church, Kolenchery at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Peter and St. Paul's Church, Kolenchery?
faq.a: Stays in St. Peter and St. Paul's Church, Kolenchery start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Peter and St. Paul's Church, Kolenchery?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kolenchery, Aikaranad South, Kottoor, Aikkaranad, Kadayiruppu.
